notes: XRay start now waits for the local SOCKS listener before health verification
Safe server switching no longer rolls back just because the XRay process exists before the SOCKS port is ready
Provider diagnostics can test VLESS/Reality profiles without changing the selected profile
XRay candidate fetch/install helpers are available for controlled recovery on Keenetic MIPS builds
Hysteria2 support and existing simple/expert UI behavior are preserved
